internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-08
Effective 12 June 2025, fuel payments no longer earn Membership Rewards points on the Gold Card.
Utility payments continue to earn 1 Membership Rewards point per Rs 50 spent, capped at 10,000 Membership Rewards points in a calendar month.

Amex currently issues this card only to residents of select serviced cities including Delhi/NCR, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Pune, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Kolkata, Indore, Coimbatore, Chandigarh/Tricity, Ahmedabad, Surat, Vadodara, Bhopal, Bhubaneshwar, Ernakulam, Vijayawada, Lucknow, Ludhiana, Nagpur, Nashik, Trivandrum, Mysuru, Cuttack and Vizag.
Airline transfers are currently listed at a 2:1 ratio, while Marriott Bonvoy transfers at 1:1 and Hilton Honors transfers at 1:0.9.
